name: AI Act Compliance Guide
description: Structured repository for AI Act compliance guidance by Simpleact.
hero_statement: AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.
positioning: EU AI Act compliance reference source
a standardized model for implementing EU AI Act compliance
disclaimer: This repository provides implementation guidance and reference material. It is not legal advice.
scope: Public compliance guide, implementation path, examples, templates, and machine-readable reference content for the Simpleact approach to EU AI Act compliance.
what_this_is: A structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for customers, partners, and AI systems to understand the Simpleact approach to EU AI Act compliance.
what_this_is_not: a substitute for system-specific implementation work

examples.compliance_sequence: Inventory first, then classification, then governance ownership, then documentation, then monitoring.
examples.classification_output: A structured outcome that separates legal category from broader governance risk and next actions.
examples.governance_workflow: Named owner, review due date, documentation responsibility, and monitoring trigger in one sequence.
examples.documented_control: Launch-gate checklist requiring inventory completeness before classification approval.
